SEARCH
Package de.uka.ilkd.key.java

Class Position

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.java.Position
All Implemented Interfaces:
Comparable<Position>
public class Position extends Object implements Comparable<Position>
The position of a source element, given by its line and column number. Depending on the implementation, the valid range of defined line and column numbers may be limited and cut off if superceded.

  • Field Summary

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    static final Position
    UNDEFINED
    The "undefined position" constant used to compare to undefined positions or remove positional information.

  • Field Details

    • UNDEFINED

      public static final Position UNDEFINED
      The "undefined position" constant used to compare to undefined positions or remove positional information.

  • Method Details

    • newOneBased

      public static Position newOneBased(int line_1, int column_0)
      Creates a new Location with 1-based line and 1-based column numbers.
      Parameters:
      line_1 - 1-based line of the Location
      column_0 - 1-based column of the Location

    • fromOneZeroBased

      public static Position fromOneZeroBased(int line_1, int column_0)
      Creates a new Location with 1-based line and 0-based column numbers. This format is used by most parsers so this deserves an explicit method call.
      Parameters:
      line_1 - 1-based line of the Location
      column_0 - 0-based column of the Location

    • fromToken

      public static Position fromToken(Token token)
      Creates a new location from a token.
      Parameters:
      token - the token

    • fromJPPosition

      public static Position fromJPPosition(com.github.javaparser.Position p)

    • offsetLine

      public Position offsetLine(int offset)
      Creates a new Position with the offset added to the line.
      Parameters:
      offset - the offset

    • line

      public int line()
      Returns the line number of this position.
      Returns:
      the line number of this position.

    • column

      public int column()
      Returns the column number of this position.
      Returns:
      the column number of this position.

    • hashCode

      public int hashCode()
      Returns the hash code of this position.
      Overrides:
      hashCode in class Object
      Returns:
      the hash code of this position.

    • equals

      public boolean equals(Object x)
      Compares this position with the given object for equality.
      Overrides:
      equals in class Object
      Returns:
      true, if the given object is a position equals to this position, false otherwise.

    • compareTo

      public int compareTo(Position p)
      Compares this position with the given object for order. An undefined position is less than any defined position.
      Specified by:
      compareTo in interface Comparable<Position>
      Parameters:
      p - the position to compare with.
      Returns:
      a negative number, zero, or a positive number, if this position is lower than, equals to, or higher than the given one.

    • isNegative

      public boolean isNegative()
      Helper method for validity checks.
      Returns:
      true iff either line or column are negative

    • toString

      public String toString()
      Returns a string representation of this object.
      Overrides:
      toString in class Object
